title: Add persisted RSS source schema and helpers
description: Add rss_sources persistence in src/server/db.ts with URL uniqueness, enabled state, refresh timestamps/errors, and idempotent seeding from current default feeds.
acceptance_criteria: Default feeds are seeded without duplicate URLs; user-added source survives restart; historical news table remains compatible.
review_initial_requirements: Verify schema is additive, default feed seeding is idempotent, duplicate URL validation exists, and news rows are not destructively migrated.
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; review:RSS schema is additive, URL uniqueness is enforced, seeding helper is idempotent; regression:news table/API helpers unchanged

title: Refactor RSS refresh around persisted sources
description: Refactor src/server/services/rss.ts so refresh can process enabled persisted sources, refresh a single source, and record per-source success/failure.
acceptance_criteria: All-source refresh uses enabled sources; disabled sources are skipped; single-source success inserts news with source name; single-source failure records latest error without damaging existing news.
review_initial_requirements: Verify failures are isolated per source, refresh result shape is structured, and source status is updated consistently.
review_regression_requirements: Existing /api/refresh call path can still return total new item count for current callers.
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; review:RSS refresh now uses enabled persisted sources, isolates failures, and records per-source status; regression:fetchAndProcessFeeds still returns aggregate new item count

title: Add RSS source management API routes
description: Add feed APIs for list, create, enable/disable, and single-source refresh while preserving /api/feeds and /api/refresh compatibility.
acceptance_criteria: Valid source creates enabled source; duplicate/invalid URL returns 4xx; enable/disable affects refresh eligibility; /api/feeds still lists name/url fields.
review_initial_requirements: Verify request validation, status codes, response shapes, and backward-compatible /api/feeds and /api/refresh behaviours.
review_regression_requirements: Existing NewsFeed refresh and sidebar source list do not break before frontend changes.
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; review:/api/feeds list/create/patch/refresh routes added with validation errors and source refresh result; regression:/api/refresh and news routes preserved

title: Add reusable research run service
description: Create a bounded research run service using query planner, configured providers, candidate storage, crawler, evidence creation, report generation, and job status updates.
acceptance_criteria: Configured providers produce stored candidates; crawlable candidates create documents/evidence; ready reports are persisted; URL budget is respected; failed pages do not abort the run.
review_initial_requirements: Verify provider errors are collected, crawl limits are enforced, status transitions are persisted, and generated reports cite stored evidence.
review_regression_requirements: Existing research.test report expectations remain valid.
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; review:run service plans queries, searches providers, stores candidates/documents/evidence, creates reports, and persists status transitions; regression:existing report generator contract preserved

title: Wire research run, documents, and report routes
description: Connect /api/research/jobs/:id/run and documents/report responses to stored runtime data with clear degraded states for missing providers or empty evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Run endpoint no longer returns placeholder; missing providers produce visible degraded result and retryable job; documents endpoint returns stored documents; report endpoint returns not_ready/ready/failed states.
review_initial_requirements: Verify 404, validation, degraded, ready, and failed paths are explicit and frontend-consumable.
review_regression_requirements: Job create/list/detail/patch routes continue to work.
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; review:/jobs/:id/run now invokes runResearchJob, documents returns stored crawl documents, and 404/degraded responses are explicit; regression:create/list/detail/patch/report routes preserved

title: Update shared frontend/server contracts
description: Update shared types for enriched RSS sources, refresh results, research documents, run responses, and degraded report states.
acceptance_criteria: Type contracts cover source status/errors, refresh results, documents, run output, and report states used by API and UI.
review_initial_requirements: Verify frontend and backend use compatible field names and optionality.
review_regression_requirements: Existing ParsedNewsItem and ResearchJobSummary usages still compile.
notes: validation:npm run lint passed; review:shared types now cover enriched RSS source, refresh result, research run response, documents, and report states; regression:existing news/research summary fields retained

title: Build search-first home and research status UI
description: Rework App and research UI so the app opens on search home, search submit creates/runs a job, and the user lands in a visible research status/results view.
acceptance_criteria: Root shows prominent search; empty search is rejected locally; valid search creates and runs job; missing provider/report-not-ready/ready report states are visible; narrow viewport does not overlap core controls.
review_initial_requirements: Verify search flow handles loading/error states, run trigger, selected job refresh, and responsive layout.
review_regression_requirements: News crawler partition remains reachable from navigation.

title: Add RSS source manager to news crawler partition
description: Add UI for listing sources, adding RSS sources, enabling/disabling sources, refreshing one source, and displaying latest status/error while preserving NewsFeed behaviours.
acceptance_criteria: User can add valid source, see validation errors, refresh one source, toggle enabled state, and continue using all-news/favorites/AI queue/detail behaviours.
review_initial_requirements: Verify manager refreshes source list after mutations, does not break NewsFeed props/state, and uses stable controls on narrow viewports.
review_regression_requirements: Existing manual refresh and 60s news polling remain functional.

title: Add focused RSS and research runtime tests
description: Add or update focused tests for RSS source validation/seeding and research run report outcomes using the existing test style.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover default source seeding or validation helpers and research run report/degraded outcomes without requiring live external provider credentials.
review_initial_requirements: Verify tests are deterministic and do not require network/provider keys.
review_regression_requirements: Existing npm run test:research remains meaningful.

title: Run validation and manual browser checks
description: Run lint, research tests, build, and manual browser checks for search-first home, degraded research state, RSS source add/refresh, and existing news partition.
acceptance_criteria: npm run lint passes; npm run test:research passes; npm run build passes; manual checks are recorded in notes with any limitations.
review_initial_requirements: Verify validation commands and manual observations are reflected in CSV notes.
